title: Karroochloa schismoides
intro: There is no information available on the plant Karroochloa schismoides.
taxonomy: Karroochloa schismoides is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Chloridoideae and the tribe Chlorideae. Karroochloa schismoides is further classified as the genus Karroochloa. The classification is based on its characteristics, including its leaf structure and seed morphology. The species is closely related to other members of the Poaceae family.
uses: I couldn't find any information about the medicinal uses of Karroochloa schismoides.
